reviews.review_description:
This is game is so bloody good oh my god, it's simple premise yet addicting gameplay it's just mwah
This game is an easy 10/10 in my books, just fun all around, and plus the creator is actually the most nicest bloke I've ever met  genuinely such a understated gem too.

developer_response.body: That's so kind <3 Have fun playing it!

reviews.review_description: Yes, there are beers to be chilled and boomerangs to defeat Kangaroos stealing my beers and barbecue. I knew that Kangaroo is a muscle mania but never thought as thief to be defeated. The boomerang physics is easy to throw and hit target but thieves are coming from all around me. The first few levels are pretty simple, but the difficulty ramps up quickly. Overall, a good time for fun.

This is so a funny game.
Haven’t played that long, but I enjoy it a lot.

Eliminate those kangoeroes, avoid stinky winds from the koalas. 
Watch out that they don’t pick your beers.

Easy to understand, but further in game, the more difficult.

Love it.
I mean, I like it... But I made it, so I may be a bit biased
Fresh, action-packed wave shooter filled with variety and hilarious Ozzy tropes. Big thanks to the dev for providing a code to giveaway in my best of App Lab video: https://youtu.be/ZNFV4r8MAYw
Fun game to play as single player. Not the same format of other games. Would consider it a hidden gem. Just tried Zen mode and it was a great addition.

Tbh, I thought this game would be pretty chill… throwing some boomerangs.. how hard can it be… 
I personally found it incredible challenging, but that’s what makes the game super fun and kept me playing.
Passing a level and beating this annoying Australian wildlife feels very satisfying. Also this game boosts your multitasking skills, haha! It’s a lovely and active game, definitely worth it! 5/5

Somebody once told me them 'roos are gonna roll me
but I said see you next thursday and now all my mates got their cold ones.
This game is way better than dealing with the bogans or the housos

developer_response.body: We gotta add a bogan boss fight. it's not in our short-term plans, but it just feels like it should be there

reviews.review_title: The best game to possibly ever exist
reviews.review_description:
Hi, I'm xboxhaslag and today I will be reviewing the best game to ever exist. 

(Note: I had a full Review typed out but when i tried to submit it it said YoU cAn'T sUbMiT a ReViEw ThAt HaS pRoFaNiTy despite not having any profanity at all so all I'm leaving is the part where I give suggestions on how to rework the chipmunks enemy) 

I suggest start with making the camera clip to your body like your boomerangs and give the camera flash a longer range. As for the chipmunk I suggest instead of an enemy that works against you, make it work with you. Maybe once once you take its photo you will have a better chance of God giving you a vegemite sandwich. Maybe once you take its photo it will roll towards and enemy and explode dealing damage to them, what if you take its photo it jumps into the beer cooler and makes the beer cold for longer if you where to take it out or have it be stolen. Maybe it latches itself to a glass bottle of beer and prevents it from breaking. 
But then again there is also the potential of it working against you. 

They could speed up the enemys for a bit, or spawn more enemy's, they could try to jump at you and latch onto your face and you have to pry them off. Maybe they will temporarily steal one of your boomerangs, what if they push an enemy out of the way so it dodges your boomerangs, what if it steals your vegemite sandwich.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feeback mate! Having the quokkas hit an enemy on the way out is a great idea. We do have to see how to balance so they don't make the levels much easier, we will take a look and see if we can make it without breaking anything else ahah. Cheers!

reviews.review_description: Very Fun And Very Original

Flying boomerangs, sneaky kangaroos and oh my goodness, lol, the 🐨🐨🐨 bears, sneaky too and they will get you if you aren't alert and quick.  This is a lot of fun and very challenging, having a blast!  The roos startle me sometimes when they get too close when I am occupied, so yes, I scream but laugh all at the same time, thanks for a fun, lighthearted and challenging game, great job.  Looking forward to advancing through the levels.  🦘🦘🦘

developer_response.body: Glad you are having a blast :´)

reviews.review_description: This is some of the best 5 dollars I've ever spent, needs more recognition.

This game is funny,cool, and awesome it is so fun I love how you can customize your boomerangs with stars and all of the mini games inside of defending all of you beer it is a great game to pass the time and have fun 5 stars

This game does a great job of portraying Australian culture in a funny way and introduces a really unique and fun gameplay mechanic (boomerangs). There are upgrades to work towards and a few different game options. This is already a really fun game with pretty good graphics. Wouldn't mind more content, loved the bosses, more mini games like that or more diverse locations would be cool. Maybe difficulty options for the arcade mode? Looking forward to updates, and keep up the good work ya blody legends :)

I am messing these kangaroos up and laughing the whole time! Throwing boomerangs to protect beer, doesn't get more Aussie than that. Oh, wait it can- There are koalas and a dijeridoo too!  This is such a unique and fun game that most definitely should be played standing! Who knew that chucking boomerangs at little kangaroos would be so enjoyable! They are quick so stay on your toes! I think this is a must have game that appeals to everyone.

This game surprised me! I am so glad I decided to try it! Such a blast to play!! While the idea is simple, the game is a ton of fun! We enjoy taking turns playing and watching each other play.

You punch or throw boomerangs to protect your beers from kangaroos and koalas (so far). I even picked one of the kangaroos up and slammed him. You also need to keep your beers in the cooler to stay cold. There is campaign, arcade, and free modes as well as easy and normal settings so all ages can play! It is 360 play, so you never know where these rascals are going to come from! Gameplay mechanics are smooth, graphics are bright and fun. 

I TOTALLY recommend this game! Tons of fun for the whole family.
This game is so underrated! It’s such a fun workout and a must buy all the animals are so cute and cute the physics are amazing I would buy it if I were you!

reviews.review_title: Bring me another game like this!
reviews.review_description: Nothing feels more satisfying than throwing a boomerang at a kangaroo that just stole your beer and then catching your boomerang and your beer from the sky afterwards. This is God Tier Vr. You feel like an Australian Thor.

developer_response.body: <3 this is one of my favourite reviews

reviews.review_title: Best workout fun anyone can have on VR
reviews.review_description:
How could you possibly be burning calories while chugging some devilish Aussie beers? What about tossing some mean boomerangs on some kleptomaniac 'roos and other sick local fauna without PETA being aware of the carefree but innocent monstrosity?
WELP, this game packs it in with a punch, delivering some of the most fun I had in years. Highly recommend!!

Great game, so much fun! 
It is very satisfying to throw and catch boomerangs and I like that the every level gives a new challenge. There is a lot of small things to play around with and the game is rewarding me with new toys all the time, it is very silly and I'm a little sad every time I realize I forgot to put on my hat in the main menu.

I have been playing in a relatively small space, I had to use stationary mode (standing), it definitely works, I just have to use the sticks to move and turn more then I would do otherwise. The confined area also made me keep a little bit calmer (to make sure I didn't punch the wall) but that really helped when everything got very hectic, so all in all I would say it works in a smaller area and I had a lot of fun!
